coefficient_format: signed little-endian Q2.30 integers represented as JSON numbers
table_key_rule: within a bundle, the complete key is device_serial plus channel mask, both frequency endpoints, sample rate, bandwidth, both gain endpoints, both temperature endpoints, calibration type, and bundle revision; coefficient payload is not part of identity
duplicate_rule: tables with any distinct key field may coexist; repeated complete keys fail closed even when coefficient payloads differ
integrity: SHA-256 over canonical JSON after removing integrity_sha256
activation: store activation separately with exact 61.44 MHz sample timestamp
